{"id":"my-5ws","title":"Dolt port mismatch: BD_DOLT_PORT=3307 vs GT_DOLT_PORT=3308","description":"Environment variables BD_DOLT_PORT (3307) and GT_DOLT_PORT (3308) are mismatched, causing Dolt connectivity issues. gt dolt start uses GT_DOLT_PORT but beads commands use BD_DOLT_PORT. This causes persistent 'connection refused' errors until manually corrected. Need to align these variables.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"jeremy@theirish.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:32:40Z","created_by":"myndyai/refinery","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:32:40Z"}
